results.text: Blinding Snowstorm: Test Fortitude DR14 or take d4 damage per hour.
Freezing Mist: Visibility obscured. Stealth advantage today.
Ice Shards: Rain of blades. Test Swift DR12 or take d4 damage.
Aurora's Blessing: Degraded armour is miraculously repaired.
Frozen Ground: Icy fissures. Test Swift DR12 to avoid falling.
Silent Night: Communication impossible. Footsteps leave no echo.
Frozen Relic: A random Rune. Test Wits DR12 to avoid a trap (d8 damage).
Ymir's Blood: Drink for +2 Might (d4 hours). Price: d6 HP damage.
Frozen Lake of the Dead: Test Wits DR14 to cross without awakening spirits.
Glacial Cavern: Warriors carrying Runes or souls waiting for bodies.
Ancient Sigils: Test Wits DR12 to gain a random Rune.
Frost-Rimed Scroll: Contains a Rune. Deciphering risks gods' wrath.
"Ymir stirs beneath the earth... his awakening ends the world."
"Hrimgrimnir is gathering an army of ice spectres."
"The River Serpents guard a powerful Rune in Hvergelmir."
"Mistwalkers lure the weak into endless confusion."
"The frozen dead are rising with increasing frequency."
